titles.title: To amend title 31, United States Code, to prohibit the use of appropriated funds, including the Judgment Fund, to settle or satisfy certain claims involving the President, political associates, or alleged governmental "weaponization", to require repayment of unlawfully disbursed funds, and for other purposes.

To amend title 31, United States Code, to prohibit the use of appropriated funds, including the Judgment Fund, to settle or satisfy certain claims involving the President, political associates, or alleged governmental "weaponization", to require repayment of unlawfully disbursed funds, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
